name: zoom-integration
description: Zoom Team Chat MCP server — list/send messages, manage channels, search contacts, and more.
long_description: Exposes ~30 Zoom Team Chat API endpoints as MCP tools. First use opens a browser for OAuth; tokens are cached at ~/.zoom-mcp/tokens/ and refreshed automatically. Requires a Zoom Marketplace OAuth app (General App) with scopes chat_message:read/write, chat_channel:read/write, contact:read, user:read and redirect URI http://localhost:8000/oauth/callback.

args: PY="$(command -v python3 || command -v python)"; [ -n "$PY" ] || { echo 'zoom-mcp: no python3 or python found on PATH' >&2; exit 127; }; exec "$PY" "$@"
where python3 >nul 2>nul && (python3 "%1") || (where python >nul 2>nul && (python "%1") || (echo zoom-mcp: no python3 or python found on PATH 1>&2 & exit /b 127))

zoom_client_id.title: Zoom Client ID
zoom_client_id.description: Client ID from your Zoom Marketplace OAuth app (Develop > Build App > General App).

zoom_client_secret.title: Zoom Client Secret
zoom_client_secret.description: Client Secret from your Zoom Marketplace OAuth app. Stored locally; never sent anywhere except Zoom.
